Reviews.Author: 26u9avvo35
Reviews.Comment:
Overall this cheat is amazing, good customizability, great lua environment. It also has good stability and amazing optimizations, for being lifetime, something I’d recommend to new comers.
.

Categories.Comment: Amazing aimbot, a heap amount of customizability from rage to legit. Has good hitbox selection, was first to do “silent aim” externally and has unique aimbot features like aim meter.

Very unique visuals, not seen anywhere else. However me personally, I’m not a fan of these visuals. I however do love the off screen visuals, text visuals (with the backplate) and how you can customize fonts, half color. The local visuals are amazing too like proximity, health reminder. However, I’m not a fan of how there’s no outlines used in the boxes, skeletons, just like something missing. But the 3d radar is immaculate, doesn’t eat up  of performance and is perfect (first ext to do so)

Clean user face, love the player list and dex and script editor. The majority of it is sorted well, one thing I don’t like is how trigger rot, vision sense, and other features are hidden away in a random section hard to find as you have to scroll down a lot.

I get that it’s lifetime, but due to conflicts with scheduling, severe experiences more significant downtime then other externals. However, stability wise, it’s extremely good. It rarely has crashes, however, recently there has been some issues but I know it’ll be fixed very shortly.

It has the basic necessity features, however, most of the “cool” features and game supports aren’t native. A lot of stuff is done through their lua environment, which isn’t necessarily a bad thing. It has great aimbot customizability, good visual customizability, fly, speed, vision sense (from x11) but not a lot of other features like lighting, velocity fly/speed, fov modifier, that type stuff. However, lua environment is great, a lot of time has been spent on it and it is amazing.

Quite confusing at first with the barrage of features, but after a day of using it, it will become extremely easy to navigate. The UI is customizable in color, theme, and font and is extremely sleek

Reviews.Author: 17qb2vj1g4
Reviews.Comment: It's my favorite because it does what it's supposed to do best. Combat.

Categories.Comment: I locked on directly to the enemy's head. The configuration is key. When set up properly, it works like a charm. It's even better than Ronin or Matcha, but those have other benefits too.
The ESP is great, the view is clear, and the lighting features are nice. You can also use these features to force shadows and make other adjustments.
It has a nice, simple UI. It could have more customization, but it's fine by default. Sometimes the scrolling is really bad. It's like Backwoods wants to ragebait me.

It's fine. I'll take those updates when they're available, but sadly, they're not often on the newest version of Roblox. The detailed changelogs include the Roblox version if it's not the newest one. However, since the cheat is extremely stable and barely affects performance on low-end hardware, I'll give it four stars.

These are some of the most advanced aimbot settings. The ESP settings are good. There are not many miscellaneous features. The speed does not use velocity, which causes a first-person player body bug, and most of the time you get rubberbanded.

Reviews.Author: 1rpm9as3e
Reviews.Comment:
heres my personal opinion about severe

severe is a really good choice if you want great combat features and has decent visuals. the UI isnt good at all in my opinion because of its non user-friendliness and because of how difficult it is to read text and further customize the features. severe also has pretty bad downtime with an average of 1 - 5 days for the external to update to the latest roblox version and a big misconception about severe is that it is lifetime, which it isnt. as the owner once stated that he never explicitly said it was lifetime, but that it was a one time purchase (meaning severe will go sub-based in the future).

would i recommend severe?  probably not because of its downtime and that it might go subscription based within the near future but if it came down to combat features, it definitely is the best with the best external silent aim ive ever seen.

Categories.Comment: Very well with amazing combat features and the best external silent aims ive seen.

Amazing features. Very good combat ones and decent visual ones.

Categories.Comment: Best functioning rage and aimbot on the market. Never fails.

I find the UI quite easy to use but newer users do tend to say its difficult to navigate. My advice is learn how to use right click.
Updating time hasn't been the best of late but in the past was quite good and will probably improve in the future. Each update will tend to last at least 3-4 so it's not the biggest issue.
Most feature rich on the market with the best luavm. Blows things like matcha and photon out the water.
